The Menu

Handcrafted drinks & elevated bar food

What people come back for

  • ✦House smash burgers stacked with bold, smoky flavor.
  • ✦Cold beer, signature cocktails, and crowd-favorite shots.
  • ✦Late-night bites made to pair with game day, music, and friends.

Best For

Big screens, live energy, and a menu built for groups.

Menu Highlights

Built for cold drinks, hot plates, and good company.

From shareable starters to stacked sandwiches, every item is made to keep the night going.

Appetizers

Loaded Nachos

jalapeños, cheese sauce, sour cream, pico

$12

Wings (6 or 12)

buffalo, BBQ, garlic parm, honey sriracha

$10 / $18

Mozzarella Sticks

marinara dipping sauce

$9

Onion Rings

beer battered, ranch dip

$8

Pretzel Bites

beer cheese sauce

$9

double smash patty, special sauce, lettuce, tomato, pickles

$14

$13

Chicken Sandwich

crispy or grilled, lettuce, tomato, comeback sauce

$13

Club Sandwich

Menu subject to change. Ask your server about daily specials and seasonal items.

About Us

Neighborhood energy with a polished bar-and-grill feel.

Cory Frank's Bar & Grill brings Kansas City a spot where the drinks are cold, the food is satisfying, and the atmosphere feels like the right place to stay awhile. Whether you're stopping in for wings and a beer, or gathering the whole crew for dinner, the menu is built around easy favorites done right.

Why Guests Love It

Bold flavors

Smash burgers, saucy wings, and shareable starters.

Great value

Menu favorites that feel premium without feeling precious.

Game-day ready

Perfect for watches, meetups, and weekend hangs.

KC proud

A local favorite rooted in the Northland.

Band Inquiries

Bring the sound. We'll bring the crowd and the drinks.

Interested in booking live music or a special event night? Cory Frank's is always looking for high-energy acts that fit the room.

Email Band Booking
